1→#!/bin/bash
     2→#
     3→# Copyright 2025 Scale Invariant, Inc.
     4→#
     5→# Licensed under the Apache License, Version 2.0 (the "License");
     6→# you may not use this file except in compliance with the License.
     7→# You may obtain a copy of the License at
     8→#
     9→#     http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0
    10→#
    11→# Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software
    12→# distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,
    13→# WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.
    14→# See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
    15→# limitations under the License.
    16→#
    17→# Author: Brad Hyslop <bhyslop@scaleinvariant.org>
    18→#
    19→# Recipe Bottle Foundry - GCB image creation and GAR deletion
    20→
    21→set -euo pipefail
    22→
    23→# Multiple inclusion detection
    24→test -z "${ZRBF_SOURCED:-}" || buc_die "Module rbf multiply sourced - check sourcing hierarchy"
    25→ZRBF_SOURCED=1
    26→
    27→######################################################################
    28→# Internal Functions (zrbf_*)
    29→
    30→zrbf_kindle() {
    31→  test -z "${ZRBF_KINDLED:-}" || buc_die "Module rbf already kindled"
    32→
    33→  # Validate environment
    34→  zburd_sentinel
    35→
    36→  buc_log_args 'Check required GCB/GAR environment variables'
    37→  zrbgc_sentinel
    38→
    39→  buc_log_args 'Verify service account files'
    40→  test -n "${RBDC_DIRECTOR_RBRA_FILE:-}" || buc_die "RBDC_DIRECTOR_RBRA_FILE not set"
    41→  test -f "${RBDC_DIRECTOR_RBRA_FILE}"   || buc_die "GCB service env file not found: ${RBDC_DIRECTOR_RBRA_FILE}"
    42→
    43→  buc_log_args 'Module Variables (ZRBF_*)'
    44→  readonly ZRBF_GCB_API_BASE="https://cloudbuild.googleapis.com/v1"
    45→  readonly ZRBF_GAR_API_BASE="https://artifactregistry.googleapis.com/v1"
    46→  readonly ZRBF_CLOUD_QUERY_BASE="https://console.cloud.google.com/cloud-build/builds"
    47→
    48→  readonly ZRBF_GCB_PROJECT_BUILDS_URL="${ZRBF_GCB_API_BASE}/projects/${RBGD_GCB_PROJECT_ID}/locations/${RBGD_GCB_REGION}/builds"
    49→  readonly ZRBF_GAR_PACKAGE_BASE="projects/${RBGD_GAR_PROJECT_ID}/locations/${RBGD_GAR_LOCATION}/repositories/${RBRR_GAR_REPOSITORY}"
    50→
    51→  buc_log_args 'Trigger dispatch endpoints'
    52→  readonly ZRBF_TRIGGERS_URL="${RBGC_API_ROOT_CLOUDBUILD}${RBGC_CLOUDBUILD_V1}/projects/${RBRR_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID}/locations/${RBGD_GCB_REGION}/triggers"
    53→
    54→  buc_log_args 'Registry API endpoints for delete'
    55→  readonly ZRBF_REGISTRY_HOST="${RBGD_GAR_LOCATION}${RBGC_GAR_HOST_SUFFIX}"
    56→  readonly ZRBF_REGISTRY_PATH="${RBGD_GAR_PROJECT_ID}/${RBRR_GAR_REPOSITORY}"
    57→  readonly ZRBF_REGISTRY_API_BASE="https://${ZRBF_REGISTRY_HOST}/v2/${ZRBF_REGISTRY_PATH}"
    58→
    59→  buc_log_args 'Media types for delete operation'
    60→  readonly ZRBF_ACCEPT_MANIFEST_MTYPES="application/vnd.docker.distribution.manifest.v2+json,application/vnd.docker.distribution.manifest.list.v2+json,application/vnd.oci.image.index.v1+json,application/vnd.oci.image.manifest.v1+json"
    61→
    62→  buc_log_args 'RBGJ files in same Tools directory as this implementation'
    63→  # Acronym: rbgjb = Recipe Bottle Google Json Build (step scripts in rbgjb/ dir)
    64→  local z_self_dir="${BASH_SOURCE[0]%/*}"
    65→  readonly ZRBF_RBGJB_STEPS_DIR="${z_self_dir}/rbgjb"
    66→  test -d "${ZRBF_RBGJB_STEPS_DIR}"   || buc_die "RBGJB steps directory not found: ${ZRBF_RBGJB_STEPS_DIR}"
    67→
    68→  buc_log_args 'Define stitched build JSON temp file'
    69→  readonly ZRBF_STITCHED_BUILD_FILE="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbf_stitched_build.json"
    70→
    71→  buc_log_args 'Define temp files for build operations'
    72→  readonly ZRBF_BUILD_ID_FILE="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbf_build_id.txt"
    73→  readonly ZRBF_BUILD_STATUS_FILE="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbf_build_status.json"
    74→  readonly ZRBF_BUILD_RUBRIC_LS="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbf_rubric_ls_remote.txt"
    75→  readonly ZRBF_BUILD_TRIGGER_BODY="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbf_trigger_run_body.json"
    76→
    77→  buc_log_args 'Define git info file (used by inscribe -> stitch)'
    78→  readonly ZRBF_GIT_INFO_FILE="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbf_git_info.json"
    79→
    80→  buc_log_args 'Define validation files'
    81→  readonly ZRBF_STATUS_CHECK_FILE="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbf_status_check.txt"
    82→
    83→  buc_log_args 'Define delete operation files'
    84→  readonly ZRBF_DELETE_PREFIX="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbf_delete_"
    85→  readonly ZRBF_TOKEN_FILE="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbf_token.txt"
    86→
    87→  buc_log_args 'Vessel-related files'
    88→  readonly ZRBF_VESSEL_SIGIL_FILE="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbf_vessel_sigil.txt"
    89→
    90→  buc_log_args 'Define stitch operation file prefix (postfixed per step id)'
    91→  readonly ZRBF_STITCH_PREFIX="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbf_stitch_"
    92→
    93→  buc_log_args 'Define inscribe operation files'
    94→  readonly ZRBF_INSCRIBE_PREFIX="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbf_inscribe_"
    95→  readonly ZRBF_INSCRIBE_CLONE_DIR="${RBGC_RUBRIC_CLONE_DIR}"
    96→  readonly ZRBF_INSCRIBE_STALENESS_SEC=86400
    97→
    98→  buc_log_args 'Define output files (BURD_OUTPUT_DIR — persists after dispatch)'
    99→  readonly ZRBF_OUTPUT_VESSEL_DIR="${BURD_OUTPUT_DIR}/rbf_vessel_dir.txt"
   100→  readonly ZRBF_OUTPUT_CONSECRATION="${BURD_OUTPUT_DIR}/rbf_consecration.txt"

1731→rbf_check_consecrations() {
  1732→  zrbf_sentinel
  1733→
  1734→  local -r z_vessel_dir="${1:-}"
  1735→
  1736→  buc_doc_brief "List consecrations for a vessel by querying GAR tags"
  1737→  buc_doc_param "vessel_dir" "Path to vessel directory containing rbrv.env"
  1738→  buc_doc_shown || return 0
  1739→
  1740→  # No-arg: list available vessels
  1741→  if test -z "${z_vessel_dir}"; then
  1742→    local z_sigils
  1743→    z_sigils=$(rbrv_list_capture) || buc_die "No vessels found"
  1744→    buc_step "Available vessels:"
  1745→    local z_sigil=""
  1746→    for z_sigil in ${z_sigils}; do
  1747→      buc_bare "        ${RBRR_VESSEL_DIR}/${z_sigil}"
  1748→    done
  1749→    buc_die "Vessel directory required"
  1750→  fi
  1751→
  1752→  # Load vessel
  1753→  zrbf_load_vessel "${z_vessel_dir}"
  1754→
  1755→  buc_step "Fetching OAuth token (Director)"
  1756→  local z_token
  1757→  z_token=$(rbgo_get_token_capture "${RBDC_DIRECTOR_RBRA_FILE}") || buc_die "Failed to get OAuth token"
  1758→
  1759→  buc_step "Querying GAR tags for ${RBRV_SIGIL}"
  1760→  local -r z_tags_file="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbf_dc_tags.json"
  1761→  curl -sL \
  1762→    --connect-timeout "${RBCC_CURL_CONNECT_TIMEOUT_SEC}" \
  1763→    --max-time "${RBCC_CURL_MAX_TIME_SEC}" \
  1764→    -H "Authorization: Bearer ${z_token}" \
  1765→    "${ZRBF_REGISTRY_API_BASE}/${RBRV_SIGIL}/tags/list" \
  1766→    > "${z_tags_file}" 2>/dev/null || buc_die "Failed to fetch tags"
  1767→
  1768→  if jq -e '.errors' "${z_tags_file}" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
  1769→    local z_err
  1770→    z_err=$(jq -r '.errors[0].message // "Unknown error"' "${z_tags_file}")
  1771→    buc_die "Registry API error: ${z_err}"
  1772→  fi
  1773→
  1774→  # Extract tags and identify full consecrations
  1775→  # Full consecration format: iYYYYMMDD_HHMMSS-bYYYYMMDD_HHMMSS
  1776→  # Tags: {CONSECRATION}-image[-suffix], {CONSECRATION}-about, {INSCRIBE_TS}-multi
  1777→  local -r z_all_tags_file="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbf_dc_all_tags.txt"
  1778→  jq -r '.tags[]? // empty' "${z_tags_file}" > "${z_all_tags_file}"
  1779→
  1780→  # Collect unique full consecrations and classify tags
  1781→  local -r z_consecrations_file="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbf_dc_consecrations.txt"
  1782→  local -r z_tag_data_file="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbf_dc_tag_data.txt"
  1783→  > "${z_consecrations_file}"
  1784→  > "${z_tag_data_file}"
  1785→
  1786→  while IFS= read -r z_tag || test -n "${z_tag}"; do
  1787→    # Match full consecration: iYYYYMMDD_HHMMSS-bYYYYMMDD_HHMMSS
  1788→    local z_consec=""
  1789→    if [[ "${z_tag}" =~ ^(i[0-9]{8}_[0-9]{6}-b[0-9]{8}_[0-9]{6}) ]]; then
  1790→      z_consec="${BASH_REMATCH[1]}"
  1791→    else
  1792→      continue
  1793→    fi
  1794→
  1795→    # Classify the tag
  1796→    if [[ "${z_tag}" == *"${RBGC_ARK_SUFFIX_IMAGE}" ]] || [[ "${z_tag}" == *"${RBGC_ARK_SUFFIX_IMAGE}"-* ]]; then
  1797→      local z_suffix="${z_tag#*${RBGC_ARK_SUFFIX_IMAGE}}"
  1798→      if test -z "${z_suffix}"; then
  1799→        echo "${z_consec}|image|consumer" >> "${z_tag_data_file}"
  1800→      else
  1801→        echo "${z_consec}|image|${z_suffix#-}" >> "${z_tag_data_file}"
  1802→      fi
  1803→      echo "${z_consec}" >> "${z_consecrations_file}"
  1804→    elif [[ "${z_tag}" == *"${RBGC_ARK_SUFFIX_ABOUT}" ]]; then
  1805→      echo "${z_consec}|about|" >> "${z_tag_data_file}"
  1806→      echo "${z_consec}" >> "${z_consecrations_file}"
  1807→    fi
  1808→  done < "${z_all_tags_file}"
  1809→
  1810→  # Deduplicate and sort consecrations (newest first)
  1811→  local -r z_unique_consec_file="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbf_dc_unique_consec.txt"
  1812→  sort -ur "${z_consecrations_file}" > "${z_unique_consec_file}"
  1813→
  1814→  if ! test -s "${z_unique_consec_file}"; then
  1815→    buc_info "No consecrations found for ${RBRV_SIGIL}"
  1816→    return 0
  1817→  fi
  1818→
  1819→  # Display each consecration with its artifacts
  1820→  printf "\nVessel: %s\n" "${RBRV_SIGIL}"
  1821→  printf "  %-42s %-30s %s\n" "Consecration" "Platforms" "About"
  1822→
  1823→  while IFS= read -r z_consecration || test -n "${z_consecration}"; do
  1824→    # Collect platform-suffixed image tags and about status for this consecration
  1825→    local z_consec_platforms=""
  1826→    local z_has_about="no"
  1827→    local z_image_count=0
  1828→    while IFS='|' read -r z_c z_type z_detail; do
  1829→      test "${z_c}" = "${z_consecration}" || continue
  1830→      if test "${z_type}" = "image" && test "${z_detail}" != "consumer"; then
  1831→        if test -n "${z_consec_platforms}"; then
  1832→          z_consec_platforms="${z_consec_platforms},${z_detail}"
  1833→        else
  1834→          z_consec_platforms="${z_detail}"
  1835→        fi
  1836→        z_image_count=$((z_image_count + 1))
  1837→      elif test "${z_type}" = "about"; then
  1838→        z_has_about="yes"
  1839→      fi
  1840→    done < "${z_tag_data_file}"
  1841→
  1842→    local z_plat_display="${z_consec_platforms:-single}"
  1843→
  1844→    printf "  %-42s %-30s %s\n" "${z_consecration}" "${z_plat_display}" "${z_has_about}"
  1845→  done < "${z_unique_consec_file}"
  1846→
  1847→  echo ""
  1848→  buc_success "Consecration check complete"
  1849→}
  1850→
  1851→# eof
  1852→
  1853→

1499→rbf_abjure() {
  1500→  zrbf_sentinel
  1501→
  1502→  local -r z_vessel_dir="${1:-}"
  1503→  local z_consecration="${2:-}"
  1504→  local z_force="${3:-}"
  1505→
  1506→  # Documentation block
  1507→  buc_doc_brief "Abjure an ark (delete all per-platform image and about artifacts)"
  1508→  buc_doc_param "vessel_dir" "Path to vessel directory containing rbrv.env"
  1509→  buc_doc_param "consecration" "Full consecration (e.g., i20260305_133650-b20260305_160530)"
  1510→  buc_doc_param "--force" "Optional: skip confirmation prompt"
  1511→  buc_doc_shown || return 0
  1512→
  1513→  # No-arg: list available vessels
  1514→  if test -z "${z_vessel_dir}"; then
  1515→    local z_sigils
  1516→    z_sigils=$(rbrv_list_capture) || buc_die "No vessels found"
  1517→    buc_step "Available vessels:"
  1518→    local z_sigil=""
  1519→    for z_sigil in ${z_sigils}; do
  1520→      buc_bare "        ${RBRR_VESSEL_DIR}/${z_sigil}"
  1521→    done
  1522→    buc_die "Vessel directory required"
  1523→  fi
  1524→
  1525→  # Load vessel
  1526→  zrbf_load_vessel "${z_vessel_dir}"
  1527→
  1528→  # Validate remaining parameters
  1529→  test -n "${z_consecration}" || buc_die "Consecration parameter required"
  1530→
  1531→  # Derive inscribe timestamp from full consecration (needed for -multi intermediate tag)
  1532→  local -r z_inscribe_ts="${z_consecration%%-b*}"
  1533→  test -n "${z_inscribe_ts}" || buc_die "Failed to derive inscribe timestamp from consecration"
  1534→
  1535→  # Check for --force flag
  1536→  local z_skip_confirm=false
  1537→  if test "${z_force}" = "--force"; then
  1538→    z_skip_confirm=true
  1539→  fi
  1540→
  1541→  buc_step "Authenticating as Director"
  1542→
  1543→  # Get OAuth token using Director credentials
  1544→  local z_token
  1545→  z_token=$(rbgo_get_token_capture "${RBDC_DIRECTOR_RBRA_FILE}") || buc_die "Failed to get OAuth token"
  1546→
  1547→  # Compute platform suffixes from vessel config
  1548→  local z_platforms="${RBRV_CONJURE_PLATFORMS// /,}"
  1549→  local z_platform_suffixes=()
  1550→  local z_remaining_plats="${z_platforms}"
  1551→  local z_plat=""
  1552→  local z_suffix=""
  1553→  while test -n "${z_remaining_plats}"; do
  1554→    z_plat="${z_remaining_plats%%,*}"
  1555→    z_suffix="${z_plat#linux/}"
  1556→    z_suffix="${z_suffix//\//}"
  1557→    z_platform_suffixes+=("-${z_suffix}")
  1558→    test "${z_remaining_plats}" = "${z_plat}" && break
  1559→    z_remaining_plats="${z_remaining_plats#*,}"
  1560→  done
  1561→
  1562→  # Build list of image tags to check/delete:
  1563→  # - Per-platform suffixed tags use full consecration
  1564→  # - Consumer-facing bare tag (multi-platform manifest list only)
  1565→  # - Intermediate -multi tag uses inscribe TS only (multi-platform only)
  1566→  local z_image_tags=()
  1567→  local z_idx=0
  1568→  for z_idx in "${!z_platform_suffixes[@]}"; do
  1569→    z_image_tags+=("${z_consecration}${RBGC_ARK_SUFFIX_IMAGE}${z_platform_suffixes[$z_idx]}")
  1570→  done
  1571→  if test "${#z_platform_suffixes[@]}" -gt 1; then
  1572→    z_image_tags+=("${z_consecration}${RBGC_ARK_SUFFIX_IMAGE}")
  1573→    z_image_tags+=("${z_inscribe_ts}-multi")
  1574→  fi
  1575→
  1576→  # About tag uses full consecration
  1577→  local -r z_about_tag="${z_consecration}${RBGC_ARK_SUFFIX_ABOUT}"
  1578→
  1579→  buc_step "Verifying ark existence"
  1580→
  1581→  # Check all image tags
  1582→  local z_existing_image_tags=()
  1583→  local z_img_tag=""
  1584→  local z_img_check_idx=0
  1585→  for z_img_tag in "${z_image_tags[@]}"; do
  1586→    local z_img_status_file="${ZRBF_DELETE_PREFIX}image_${z_img_check_idx}_status.txt"
  1587→    local z_img_response_file="${ZRBF_DELETE_PREFIX}image_${z_img_check_idx}_response.json"
  1588→
  1589→    curl --head -s                                     \
  1590→      --connect-timeout "${RBCC_CURL_CONNECT_TIMEOUT_SEC}" \
  1591→      --max-time "${RBCC_CURL_MAX_TIME_SEC}"           \
  1592→      -H "Authorization: Bearer ${z_token}"           \
  1593→      -H "Accept: ${ZRBF_ACCEPT_MANIFEST_MTYPES}"     \
  1594→      -w "%{http_code}"                               \
  1595→      -o "${z_img_response_file}"                     \
  1596→      "${ZRBF_REGISTRY_API_BASE}/${RBRV_SIGIL}/manifests/${z_img_tag}" \
  1597→      > "${z_img_status_file}" || buc_die "HEAD request failed for image tag: ${z_img_tag}"
  1598→
  1599→    local z_img_http_code
  1600→    z_img_http_code=$(<"${z_img_status_file}")
  1601→    test -n "${z_img_http_code}" || buc_die "HTTP status code is empty for image tag: ${z_img_tag}"
  1602→
  1603→    if test "${z_img_http_code}" = "200"; then
  1604→      z_existing_image_tags+=("${z_img_tag}")
  1605→    elif test "${z_img_http_code}" != "404"; then
  1606→      buc_die "Unexpected HTTP status ${z_img_http_code} for image tag: ${z_img_tag}"
  1607→    fi
  1608→    z_img_check_idx=$((z_img_check_idx + 1))
  1609→  done
  1610→
  1611→  # Check if -about artifact exists
  1612→  local z_about_status_file="${ZRBF_DELETE_PREFIX}about_status.txt"
  1613→  local z_about_response_file="${ZRBF_DELETE_PREFIX}about_response.json"
  1614→
  1615→  curl --head -s                                     \
  1616→    --connect-timeout "${RBCC_CURL_CONNECT_TIMEOUT_SEC}" \
  1617→    --max-time "${RBCC_CURL_MAX_TIME_SEC}"           \
  1618→    -H "Authorization: Bearer ${z_token}"           \
  1619→    -H "Accept: ${ZRBF_ACCEPT_MANIFEST_MTYPES}"     \
  1620→    -w "%{http_code}"                               \
  1621→    -o "${z_about_response_file}"                   \
  1622→    "${ZRBF_REGISTRY_API_BASE}/${RBRV_SIGIL}/manifests/${z_about_tag}" \
  1623→    > "${z_about_status_file}" || buc_die "HEAD request failed for -about artifact"
  1624→
  1625→  local z_about_http_code
  1626→  z_about_http_code=$(<"${z_about_status_file}")
  1627→  test -n "${z_about_http_code}" || buc_die "HTTP status code is empty for -about"
  1628→
  1629→  local z_about_exists=false
  1630→  if test "${z_about_http_code}" = "200"; then
  1631→    z_about_exists=true
  1632→  elif test "${z_about_http_code}" != "404"; then
  1633→    buc_die "Unexpected HTTP status ${z_about_http_code} when checking -about artifact"
  1634→  fi
  1635→
  1636→  # Evaluate ark state
  1637→  if test "${#z_existing_image_tags[@]}" -eq 0 && test "${z_about_exists}" = "false"; then
  1638→    buc_die "Ark not found: no image tags and no -about exists for ${RBRV_SIGIL}/${z_consecration}"
  1639→  fi
  1640→
  1641→  if test "${#z_existing_image_tags[@]}" -gt 0 && test "${z_about_exists}" = "false"; then
  1642→    buc_warn "Orphaned artifact detected: image tags exist but -about is missing"
  1643→  elif test "${#z_existing_image_tags[@]}" -eq 0 && test "${z_about_exists}" = "true"; then
  1644→    buc_warn "Orphaned artifact detected: -about exists but no image tags found"
  1645→  fi
  1646→
  1647→  # Confirm abjuration unless --force
  1648→  if test "${z_skip_confirm}" = "false"; then
  1649→    local z_confirm_msg="Will abjure ark ${RBRV_SIGIL}/${z_consecration}:"
  1650→    for z_img_tag in "${z_existing_image_tags[@]}"; do
  1651→      z_confirm_msg="${z_confirm_msg}\n  - ${RBRV_SIGIL}:${z_img_tag}"
  1652→    done
  1653→    if test "${z_about_exists}" = "true"; then
  1654→      z_confirm_msg="${z_confirm_msg}\n  - ${RBRV_SIGIL}:${z_about_tag}"
  1655→    fi
  1656→    buc_require "${z_confirm_msg}" "yes"
  1657→  fi
  1658→
  1659→  # Delete all existing image tags
  1660→  local z_img_del_idx=0
  1661→  for z_img_tag in "${z_existing_image_tags[@]}"; do
  1662→    buc_step "Deleting image tag: ${z_img_tag}"
  1663→
  1664→    local z_delete_img_status="${ZRBF_DELETE_PREFIX}delete_image_${z_img_del_idx}_status.txt"
  1665→    local z_delete_img_response="${ZRBF_DELETE_PREFIX}delete_image_${z_img_del_idx}_response.json"
  1666→
  1667→    curl -X DELETE -s                                   \
  1668→      --connect-timeout "${RBCC_CURL_CONNECT_TIMEOUT_SEC}" \
  1669→      --max-time "${RBCC_CURL_MAX_TIME_SEC}"             \
  1670→      -H "Authorization: Bearer ${z_token}"             \
  1671→      -w "%{http_code}"                                 \
  1672→      -o "${z_delete_img_response}"                     \
  1673→      "${ZRBF_REGISTRY_API_BASE}/${RBRV_SIGIL}/manifests/${z_img_tag}" \
  1674→      > "${z_delete_img_status}" || buc_die "DELETE request failed for image tag: ${z_img_tag}"
  1675→
  1676→    local z_delete_img_code
  1677→    z_delete_img_code=$(<"${z_delete_img_status}")
  1678→    test -n "${z_delete_img_code}" || buc_die "HTTP status code is empty for image tag delete: ${z_img_tag}"
  1679→
  1680→    if test "${z_delete_img_code}" != "202" && test "${z_delete_img_code}" != "204"; then
  1681→      buc_warn "Response body: $(cat "${z_delete_img_response}" 2>/dev/null || echo 'empty')"
  1682→      buc_die "Failed to delete image tag ${z_img_tag} (HTTP ${z_delete_img_code})"
  1683→    fi
  1684→
  1685→    buc_info "Deleted: ${RBRV_SIGIL}:${z_img_tag}"
  1686→    z_img_del_idx=$((z_img_del_idx + 1))
  1687→  done
  1688→
  1689→  # Delete -about artifact if exists
  1690→  if test "${z_about_exists}" = "true"; then
  1691→    buc_step "Deleting -about artifact"
  1692→
  1693→    local z_delete_about_status="${ZRBF_DELETE_PREFIX}delete_about_status.txt"
  1694→    local z_delete_about_response="${ZRBF_DELETE_PREFIX}delete_about_response.json"
  1695→
  1696→    curl -X DELETE -s                                   \
  1697→      --connect-timeout "${RBCC_CURL_CONNECT_TIMEOUT_SEC}" \
  1698→      --max-time "${RBCC_CURL_MAX_TIME_SEC}"             \
  1699→      -H "Authorization: Bearer ${z_token}"             \
  1700→      -w "%{http_code}"                                 \
  1701→      -o "${z_delete_about_response}"                   \
  1702→      "${ZRBF_REGISTRY_API_BASE}/${RBRV_SIGIL}/manifests/${z_about_tag}" \
  1703→      > "${z_delete_about_status}" || buc_die "DELETE request failed for -about"
  1704→
  1705→    local z_delete_about_code
  1706→    z_delete_about_code=$(<"${z_delete_about_status}")
  1707→    test -n "${z_delete_about_code}" || buc_die "HTTP status code is empty for -about delete"
  1708→
  1709→    if test "${z_delete_about_code}" != "202" && test "${z_delete_about_code}" != "204"; then
  1710→      buc_warn "Response body: $(cat "${z_delete_about_response}" 2>/dev/null || echo 'empty')"
  1711→      buc_die "Failed to delete -about artifact (HTTP ${z_delete_about_code})"
  1712→    fi
  1713→
  1714→    buc_info "Deleted: ${RBRV_SIGIL}:${z_about_tag}"
  1715→  fi
  1716→
  1717→  # Display results
  1718→  echo ""
  1719→  buc_success "Ark abjured: ${RBRV_SIGIL}/${z_consecration}"
  1720→  for z_img_tag in "${z_existing_image_tags[@]}"; do
  1721→    echo "  - ${RBRV_SIGIL}:${z_img_tag} deleted"
  1722→  done
  1723→  if test "${z_about_exists}" = "true"; then
  1724→    echo "  - ${RBRV_SIGIL}:${z_about_tag} deleted"
  1725→  fi
  1726→}
  1727→
  1728→######################################################################
  1729→# Consecration Check (rbw-Dc)
  1730→

   109→  test "${ZRBF_KINDLED:-}" = "1" || buc_die "Module rbf not kindled - call zrbf_kindle first"
   110→}
   111→
   112→# Check concurrent build quota against regime requirements
   113→# Args: token mode
   114→#   mode: "gate" (die if insufficient) or "advisory" (warn if insufficient)
   115→zrbf_quota_preflight() {
   116→  zrbf_sentinel
   117→
   118→  local -r z_token="${1:-}"
   119→  local -r z_mode="${2:-}"
   120→
   121→  test -n "${z_token}" || buc_die "zrbf_quota_preflight: token required"
   122→  test -n "${z_mode}"  || buc_die "zrbf_quota_preflight: mode required (gate|advisory)"
   123→
   124→  # Extract vCPU count from machine type (last segment after final hyphen)
   125→  local -r z_vcpus="${RBRR_GCB_MACHINE_TYPE##*-}"
   126→  case "${z_vcpus}" in
   127→    ""|0|*[!0-9]*)
   128→      buc_warn "Cannot parse vCPU count from RBRR_GCB_MACHINE_TYPE='${RBRR_GCB_MACHINE_TYPE}' -- skipping quota preflight"
   129→      return 0
   130→      ;;
   131→  esac
   132→
   133→  buc_log_args "Machine type ${RBRR_GCB_MACHINE_TYPE} = ${z_vcpus} vCPUs"
   134→
   135→  # Query Service Usage consumer quota API for concurrent_private_pool_build_cpus
   136→  local -r z_metric_encoded="cloudbuild.googleapis.com%2Fconcurrent_private_pool_build_cpus"
   137→  local -r z_url="${RBGC_API_ROOT_SERVICEUSAGE}${RBGC_SERVICEUSAGE_V1BETA1}/projects/${RBRR_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID}/services/cloudbuild.googleapis.com/consumerQuotaMetrics/${z_metric_encoded}"
   138→
   139→  buc_step "Checking concurrent build quota"
   140→  rbgu_http_json "GET" "${z_url}" "${z_token}" "quota_preflight"
   141→
   142→  local z_code=""
   143→  z_code=$(rbgu_http_code_capture "quota_preflight") || z_code=""
   144→  if test "${z_code}" != "200"; then
   145→    buc_warn "Could not query build quota (HTTP ${z_code}) -- skipping preflight check"
   146→    return 0
   147→  fi
   148→
   149→  # Filter quota response to region-specific bucket via intermediate file
   150→  rbgu_jq_file_to_file_ok "quota_preflight" "quota_region" \
   151→    "[.consumerQuotaLimits[0].quotaBuckets[] | select(.dimensions.region == \"${RBRR_GCP_REGION}\")] | .[0] // {}" \
   152→    || true
   153→
   154→  # Extract effective limit from region bucket, then fallback to first bucket
   155→  local z_limit=""
   156→  z_limit=$(rbgu_json_field_capture "quota_region" '.effectiveLimit') || z_limit=""
   157→  if test -z "${z_limit}"; then
   158→    z_limit=$(rbgu_json_field_capture "quota_preflight" \
   159→      '.consumerQuotaLimits[0].quotaBuckets[0].effectiveLimit') || z_limit=""
   160→  fi
   161→
   162→  if test -z "${z_limit}"; then
   163→    buc_warn "Could not extract quota limit -- skipping preflight check"
   164→    return 0
   165→  fi
   166→
   167→  # -1 means unlimited
   168→  if test "${z_limit}" = "-1"; then
   169→    buc_info "Quota: unlimited concurrent private pool build CPUs"
   170→    return 0
   171→  fi
   172→
   173→  # Compute max concurrent builds
   174→  local -r z_max_concurrent=$((z_limit / z_vcpus))
   175→
   176→  buc_log_args "Quota ${z_limit} vCPUs, machine ${z_vcpus} vCPUs, max concurrent ${z_max_concurrent}, required ${RBRR_GCB_MIN_CONCURRENT_BUILDS}"
   177→
   178→  if test "${z_max_concurrent}" -lt "${RBRR_GCB_MIN_CONCURRENT_BUILDS}"; then
   179→    buc_warn "Build quota insufficient: ${z_limit} vCPU quota / ${z_vcpus} vCPUs per build = ${z_max_concurrent} concurrent (need ${RBRR_GCB_MIN_CONCURRENT_BUILDS})"
   180→    buc_tabtarget "${RBZ_QUOTA_BUILD}"
   181→    if test "${z_mode}" = "gate"; then
   182→      buc_die "Quota preflight failed -- review capacity settings above"
   183→    fi
   184→  else
   185→    buc_info "Quota OK: ${z_limit} vCPU / ${z_vcpus} per build = ${z_max_concurrent} concurrent (need ${RBRR_GCB_MIN_CONCURRENT_BUILDS})"
   186→  fi
   187→}
   188→
   189→zrbf_stitch_build_json() {
   190→  zrbf_sentinel
   191→
   192→  buc_log_args 'Stitching trigger-compatible build JSON from step scripts'
   193→
   194→  # Preconditions: vessel loaded and git state captured
   195→  test -s "${ZRBF_VESSEL_SIGIL_FILE}" || buc_die "Vessel not loaded — call zrbf_load_vessel first"
   196→  test -s "${ZRBF_GIT_INFO_FILE}"     || buc_die "Git info not captured — ensure git metadata is captured before stitch"
   197→
   198→  buc_log_args 'Read vessel state for substitutions'
   199→  local -r z_sigil=$(<"${ZRBF_VESSEL_SIGIL_FILE}")
   200→  test -n "${z_sigil}" || buc_die "Empty vessel sigil"
   201→  local -r z_dockerfile_name="${RBRV_CONJURE_DOCKERFILE##*/}"
   202→  local -r z_platforms="${RBRV_CONJURE_PLATFORMS// /,}"
   203→
   204→  # Platform count detection
   205→  local z_platform_count=0
   206→  local z_remaining_count="${z_platforms}"
   207→  local z_p_count=""
   208→  while test -n "${z_remaining_count}"; do
   209→    z_p_count="${z_remaining_count%%,*}"
   210→    z_platform_count=$((z_platform_count + 1))
   211→    test "${z_remaining_count}" = "${z_p_count}" && break
   212→    z_remaining_count="${z_remaining_count#*,}"
   213→  done
   214→  buc_log_args "Vessel platforms: ${z_platform_count} (${z_platforms})"
   215→
   216→  buc_log_args 'Extract git state for substitutions'
   217→  local -r z_stitch_git_commit_file="${ZRBF_STITCH_PREFIX}git_commit.txt"
   218→  local -r z_stitch_git_branch_file="${ZRBF_STITCH_PREFIX}git_branch.txt"
   219→  local -r z_stitch_git_repo_file="${ZRBF_STITCH_PREFIX}git_repo.txt"
   220→
   221→  jq -r '.commit' "${ZRBF_GIT_INFO_FILE}" > "${z_stitch_git_commit_file}" \
   222→    || buc_die "Failed to extract git commit from info file"
   223→  jq -r '.branch' "${ZRBF_GIT_INFO_FILE}" > "${z_stitch_git_branch_file}" \
   224→    || buc_die "Failed to extract git branch from info file"
   225→  jq -r '.repo'   "${ZRBF_GIT_INFO_FILE}" > "${z_stitch_git_repo_file}" \
   226→    || buc_die "Failed to extract git repo from info file"
   227→
   228→  local -r z_git_commit=$(<"${z_stitch_git_commit_file}")
   229→  local -r z_git_branch=$(<"${z_stitch_git_branch_file}")
   230→  local -r z_git_repo=$(<"${z_stitch_git_repo_file}")
   231→
   232→  test -n "${z_git_commit}" || buc_die "Git commit is empty"
   233→  test -n "${z_git_branch}" || buc_die "Git branch is empty"
   234→  test -n "${z_git_repo}"   || buc_die "Git repo is empty"
   235→
   236→  # Step definitions: script|builder|entrypoint|id
   237→  # Entrypoint 'bash' uses args ["-lc", script], 'sh' uses ["-c", script]
   238→  # Delimiter is | because image refs contain colons (sha256 digests)
   239→  # Pipeline: buildx --push → per-platform pullback → SLSA provenance via images: field
   240→  local z_step_defs=(
   241→    "rbgjb01-derive-tag-base.sh|${RBRG_GCLOUD_IMAGE_REF}|bash|derive-tag-base"
   242→    "rbgjb02-qemu-binfmt.sh|${RBRG_DOCKER_IMAGE_REF}|bash|qemu-binfmt"
   243→    "rbgjb03-buildx-push-multi.sh|${RBRG_DOCKER_IMAGE_REF}|bash|buildx-push-multi"
   244→    "rbgjb04-per-platform-pullback.sh|${RBRG_DOCKER_IMAGE_REF}|bash|per-platform-pullback"
   245→    "rbgjb05-push-per-platform.sh|${RBRG_DOCKER_IMAGE_REF}|bash|push-per-platform"
   246→    "rbgjb06-syft-per-platform.sh|${RBRG_DOCKER_IMAGE_REF}|bash|syft-per-platform"
   247→    "rbgjb07-build-info-per-platform.sh|${RBRG_ALPINE_IMAGE_REF}|sh|build-info-per-platform"
   248→    "rbgjb08-buildx-push-about.sh|${RBRG_DOCKER_IMAGE_REF}|bash|buildx-push-about"
   249→    "rbgjb09-imagetools-create.sh|${RBRG_DOCKER_IMAGE_REF}|bash|imagetools-create"

content.text:
Based on my analysis of the file, here is the complete report:

## Summary Report: rbf_Foundry.sh

### 1. Full List of Function Names

**Public Functions (rbf_*):**
- `rbf_build()` — Build container image from vessel via trigger dispatch
- `rbf_delete()` — Delete/abjure container images
- `rbf_list()` — List artifacts
- `rbf_beseech()` — Beseech (request) image build
- `rbf_retrieve()` — Retrieve build status/artifacts
- `rbf_summon()` — Summon (invoke) container build
- `rbf_rubric_inscribe()` — Inscribe rubric (git metadata)
- `rbf_abjure()` — Abjure an ark (delete all per-platform image and about artifacts)
- `rbf_check_consecrations()` — List consecrations for a vessel by querying GAR tags

**Internal Functions (zrbf_*):**
- `zrbf_kindle()` — Initialize module with environment validation
- `zrbf_sentinel()` — Verify module is kindled
- `zrbf_quota_preflight()` — Check concurrent build quota against regime requirements
- `zrbf_stitch_build_json()` — Stitch trigger-compatible build JSON from step scripts
- (Additional internal functions exist but require further reading)

---

### 2. Complete Text of `rbf_check_consecrations` Function

Located at line 1731–1849. This function:
- Lists consecrations (built artifact versions) for a vessel by querying GAR tags
- Takes optional `vessel_dir` parameter (path to vessel directory containing rbrv.env)
- Without args: lists available vessels and dies with requirement
- With args: loads vessel, fetches OAuth token as Director, queries GAR registry API for tags
- Extracts full consecration format: `iYYYYMMDD_HHMMSS-bYYYYMMDD_HHMMSS`
- Classifies tags: image (consumer/platform-suffixed) and about artifacts
- Deduplicates and sorts consecrations (newest first)
- Displays consecration with platform info and about status
- Returns success message when complete

---

### 3. Complete Text of `rbf_abjure` Function

Located at line 1499–1726. This function:
- **Purpose**: Delete (abjure) an ark—all per-platform image and about artifacts for a consecration
- **Parameters**:
  - `vessel_dir` — Path to vessel directory containing rbrv.env
  - `consecration` — Full consecration (e.g., `i20260305_133650-b20260305_160530`)
  - `--force` — Optional: skip confirmation prompt
- **Behavior**:
  - No-arg: lists available vessels, dies with requirement
  - Loads vessel via `zrbf_load_vessel`
  - Derives inscribe timestamp from full consecration
  - Gets OAuth token as Director
  - Computes platform suffixes from vessel config
  - Builds list of image tags and about tags
  - Verifies ark existence with HEAD requests (HTTP 200/404 checks)
  - Warns if orphaned artifacts detected (image without about, or vice versa)
  - Prompts for confirmation unless `--force` flag given
  - Deletes all image tags via DELETE requests (expects HTTP 202 or 204)
  - Deletes about artifact if exists
  - Displays success with list of deleted artifacts

---

### 4. Complete Text of `rbf_build` Function (First 50 Lines)

Located at line 537–586:

```bash
rbf_build() {
  zrbf_sentinel

  local -r z_vessel_dir="${1:-}"

  # Documentation block
  buc_doc_brief "Build container image from vessel via trigger dispatch"
  buc_doc_param "vessel_dir" "Path to vessel directory containing rbrv.env"
  buc_doc_shown || return 0

  buc_log_args "Validate parameters"
  if test -z "${z_vessel_dir}"; then
    local z_sigils
    z_sigils=$(rbrv_list_capture) || buc_die "No vessels found"
    buc_step "Available vessels:"
    local z_sigil=""
    for z_sigil in ${z_sigils}; do
      buc_bare "        ${RBRR_VESSEL_DIR}/${z_sigil}"
    done
    buc_die "Vessel directory required"
  fi

  # Load and validate vessel
  zrbf_load_vessel "${z_vessel_dir}"

  buc_log_args "Verify vessel has conjuring configuration"
  test -n "${RBRV_CONJURE_DOCKERFILE:-}" || buc_die "Vessel '${RBRV_SIGIL}' is not configured for conjuring (no RBRV_CONJURE_DOCKERFILE)"
  test -n "${RBRV_CONJURE_BLDCONTEXT:-}" || buc_die "Vessel '${RBRV_SIGIL}' is not configured for conjuring (no RBRV_CONJURE_BLDCONTEXT)"

  buc_log_args "Resolve paths from vessel configuration"
  test -f "${RBRV_CONJURE_DOCKERFILE}" || buc_die "Dockerfile not found: ${RBRV_CONJURE_DOCKERFILE}"
  test -d "${RBRV_CONJURE_BLDCONTEXT}" || buc_die "Build context not found: ${RBRV_CONJURE_BLDCONTEXT}"

  buc_log_args "Enforce vessel binfmt policy"
  if test "${RBRV_CONJURE_BINFMT_POLICY}" = "forbid"; then
    if test "${RBRV_CONJURE_PLATFORMS}" != "${RBGC_BUILD_RUNNER_PLATFORM}"; then
      buc_die "Vessel '${RBRV_SIGIL}' forbids binfmt but RBRV_CONJURE_PLATFORMS='${RBRV_CONJURE_PLATFORMS}' extends beyond Cloud Build runner platform (${RBGC_BUILD_RUNNER_PLATFORM})"
    fi
  fi

  buc_info "Building vessel image: ${RBRV_SIGIL}"

  # Source Director RBRA for credentials (still needed for OAuth token)
  buc_step "Loading Director RBRA credentials"
  source "${RBDC_DIRECTOR_RBRA_FILE}" || buc_die "Failed to source Director RBRA"
  test -n "${RBRR_RUBRIC_REPO_URL:-}" || buc_die "RBRR_RUBRIC_REPO_URL not set in rbrr.env"

  # Authenticate as Director
  buc_step "Authenticating as Director"
  local z_token=""
```
